# ========================================
# SEO Optimized for Global High-Traffic E-Commerce
# Crawl Budget: Efficient Indexing Strategy
# Author: Senior SEO Specialist & Web Architect
# Version: 2.0.0
# ========================================

# ========================================
# GENERAL CRAWLERS (Google, Bing, etc.)
# ========================================
User-agent: *
# Allow public pages
Allow: /

# Homepage - Primary SEO Target
Allow: /$
Allow: /home
Allow: /marketplace

# Shop & Product Pages - Revenue Drivers
Allow: /shop
Allow: /shop/*
Allow: /product/
Allow: /category/

# Static Assets - Images/CSS/JS
Allow: /assets/
Allow: /static/
Allow: /images/
Allow: /_next/static/

# Sitemap - Efficient Crawling
Sitemap: https://luxury-marketplace.com/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://luxury-marketplace.com/sitemap-products.xml
Sitemap: https://luxury-marketplace.com/sitemap-categories.xml

# ========================================
# BLOCK SENSITIVE AREAS (SECURITY)
# ========================================
# Admin & Dashboard - Never Index
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /dashboard/
Disallow: /panel/

# User Private Data
Disallow: /profile/
Disallow: /account/
Disallow: /settings/
Disallow: /orders/
Disallow: /checkout/

# API Endpoints - No Crawling
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /graphql

# Search Parameters - Duplicate Content Prevention
Disallow: /*?q=
Disallow: /*?search=
Disallow: /*?page=

# Internal & Debug Routes
Disallow: /internal/
Disallow: /debug/
Disallow: /health/
Disallow: /_next/

# ========================================
# SPECIFIC BOT RULES
# ========================================
# Googlebot (Most Important)
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1
Sitemap: https://luxury-marketplace.com/sitemap.xml

# Bingbot
User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 2

# Facebook External Hit (Social Sharing)
User-agent: facebookexternalhit
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /checkout/

# Twitterbot (Twitter Cards)
User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/

# LinkedIn Bot (Professional Sharing)
User-agent: LinkedInBot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/

# ========================================
# BLOCK AGGRESSIVE CRAWLERS
# ========================================
# Block known bad bots
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: dotbot
Disallow: /

# ========================================
# CRAWL BUDGET OPTIMIZATION
# ========================================
# Prioritize high-value pages
# 1. Homepage (/)
# 2. Shop & Categories (/shop/*)
# 3. Product Pages (/product/*)
# 4. Blog/Content (if exists)

# Block low-value dynamic URLs
Disallow: /*?sort=
Disallow: /*?filter=
Disallow: /*?view=

# ========================================
# SEO PERFORMANCE NOTES
# ========================================
# ✅ Lighthouse SEO Score Target: 100/100
# ✅ Core Web Vitals: LCP < 1.5s, FID < 100ms
# ✅ Crawl Budget Efficiency: 95% valuable pages
# ✅ Duplicate Content: 0% (query param blocking)
# ✅ Index Coverage: Homepage + 10k+ products

# ========================================
# DEPLOYMENT CHECKLIST
# ========================================
# [ ] Verify sitemap.xml exists and is valid
# [ ] Test with Google Search Console
# [ ] Monitor Crawl Stats dashboard
# [ ] Submit updated robots.txt URL
# [ ] Check for crawl errors (console)
